task_completion.description: Update verification_date and delineator for all wetlands
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the attribute form for the wetland_boundaries layer where 'verification_date' is set to '2024-09-15' and 'delineator' is set to 'Survey Team Alpha'.

task_completion.description: Correctly classify field_verified as CONFIRMED or REJECTED based on soil borings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the attribute form for wetland_boundaries where 'field_verified' is set to CONFIRMED for WL-001, WL-003, and WL-005, and REJECTED for WL-002, WL-004, and WL-006.

task_completion.description: Update boundary_accuracy to FAILED for REJECTED wetlands
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the attribute form for the REJECTED wetlands (WL-002, WL-004, WL-006) with 'boundary_accuracy' explicitly set to 'FAILED'.

task_completion.description: Identify the CONFIRMED wetland with the shallowest average water depth and update its nwi_status
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the attribute form for WL-005 (which has the shallowest average depth of 8.5cm) with 'nwi_status' set to 'primary_reference'.

task_completion.description: Create point features in verification_results for each REJECTED wetland with correct attributes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing new points being created in the 'verification_results' layer. The attribute forms for these new points must show 'result_id' as <wetland_id>_RESULT, 'finding' as 'INSUFFICIENT_HYDRIC_INDICATORS', and 'notes' listing the specific negative boring IDs (e.g., SB-003, SB-004, SB-005 for WL-002).

integrity.description: Agent used the QField GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the QField map interface, layer panel, and attribute forms, rather than using a terminal or SQLite command line to modify the database.

integrity.description: Agent used QField's digitizing tools to create new points
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show QField's edit mode active (pencil icon) and the crosshair/digitizing interface being used to place points for the verification_results layer.

integrity.description: Agent actively checked soil boring attributes before making decisions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening the attribute forms or identifying features for the 'soil_borings' layer to check 'is_wetland_positive' and 'depth_to_water_cm' before updating the wetland boundaries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground truth classifications: WL-001=CONFIRMED, WL-002=REJECTED, WL-003=CONFIRMED, WL-004=REJECTED, WL-005=CONFIRMED, WL-006=REJECTED. All 6 wetlands must have verification_date='2024-09-15' and delineator='Survey Team Alpha'. The 3 REJECTED wetlands must have boundary_accuracy='FAILED'. WL-005 has the shallowest average depth_to_water_cm (8.5cm) among CONFIRMED wetlands, so its nwi_status must be 'primary_reference'. Three points must be created in verification_results: WL-002_RESULT (notes: SB-003, SB-004, SB-005), WL-004_RESULT (notes: SB-008, SB-010), and WL-006_RESULT (notes: SB-013, SB-014). All 3 points must have finding='INSUFFICIENT_HYDRIC_INDICATORS'.
